status: DEV/PROVISIONAL (MI-05 + A1.2, terminology-value-sets-provisional): system + value-set bindings for SNOMED CT-AU + AMT + LOINC used by ontoserver-client.js. The `ecl` expansions are DEV medicine-picker expressions (ADHA ecl-examples patterns), used by $expand only; the canonical AMT reference set + NCTS ValueSet URLs are CONFIRMED AT DEPLOY against the live NCTS / self-hosted Ontoserver (blocker B6). Single-code $validate-code still uses SNOMED CT-AU CodeSystem membership until a refset is bound. NOT clinically authoritative; the RF2 distribution itself is licensed and never enters the repo.

AMT.note: AMT concepts are delivered within SNOMED CT-AU. A single AMT code is validated by SNOMED CT-AU CodeSystem membership (valueset_url stays null until a refset is bound). Text expansion ($expand) uses the DEV medicine-picker ECL below via implicit_valueset.
AMT.ecl_note: DEV medicine-picker ECL (ADHA ecl-examples descendant-or-self pattern over the SNOMED 'Medicinal product' hierarchy). REPLACE at deploy with the AMT-module-scoped reference set (e.g. an AMT MPUU/TPUU refset) confirmed against NCTS. Provisional; not clinically authoritative.

LOINC.note: LOINC is being added to the NCTS; resolves via Ontoserver syndication once loaded. $validate-code uses LOINC CodeSystem membership; $expand fails safe until a LOINC ValueSet is bound. Fail-safe miss when LOINC is not loaded on the endpoint.

not_resolved_here.note: Systems this Ontoserver client deliberately does NOT resolve — routed elsewhere or licensed/deploy-bound. Each FAILS SAFE (miss, no fabrication) if requested through this client; resolveSystem() returns null for them.
not_resolved_here.ICD_10_AM: Licensed classification (IHACPA). CodeSystem URI + content are bound at deploy on a licensed NCTS/self-host endpoint; fail-safe until then. NOTE: 13th Edition is current (from 2025-07-01); the repo standards pin is 12th Edition — see the A1.3 decision memo (docs/structure-notes) before any AU coding claim ships.
not_resolved_here.PBS: PBS item codes come from the PBS Data API (data.pbs.gov.au), not an Ontoserver terminology operation. Not resolved by this client.
not_resolved_here.ICD_11: International classification; resolved by the CSIRO sandbox live-adapter (live-adapter.js), not this AU-content client.
